mapper.select: SELECT id FROM document WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT id, name, parent_id, user_id, create_time FROM category WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time
SELECT id, name, parent_id, user_id, create_time, is_deleted, deleted_at FROM category WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 1 ORDER BY deleted_at DESC
SELECT id, name, parent_id, user_id, create_time, is_deleted, deleted_at FROM category WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time
